title: Reading Comprehension
subject: Language Arts
description: Read stories and answer questions to show understanding
curriculum: Jamaica NSC Grade 2 - Language Arts Strand: Reading for Meaning & Enjoyment
nscObjectives: Read grade-level texts with fluency and expression
Identify main idea and supporting details
Use context clues to understand new words

sections.name: Story 1: Back to School
sections.instruction: Read the story carefully, then answer the questions.

passage.title: Back to School
passage.content:
In September, Janelle goes back to school. She wakes up early, makes her bed and eats breakfast. Her mother gives her a cup of tea and a warm patty.

Janelle packs her bag with her books, pencils and a new crayon set. She feels happy because she will see her friends again.

When she reaches school, she says, "Good morning, Miss Brown," and sits quietly in her Grade 2 class. Janelle is ready to work hard this term.

questions.hint: Look at the first sentence of the passage.

questions.prompt: In which month does Janelle go back to school?
What does her mother give her for breakfast?
options: A cup of tea and a warm patty
questions.correct: A cup of tea and a warm patty

questions.prompt: How does Janelle feel about going back to school?
questions.hint: The passage tells us how she feels about seeing her friends.
Who does Janelle say 'Good morning' to?

sections.name: Story 2: A Day at the Beach
sections.instruction: Read the story carefully, then answer the questions.

passage.title: A Day at the Beach
passage.content:
On Saturday, Marcus went to the beach with his family. His father drove the car while his mother packed the food.

They brought fried chicken, rice and peas, and cool lemonade. Marcus loved to swim in the blue water.

He built a big sandcastle with his little sister, Keisha. They found three pretty shells on the sand.

When the sun began to set, they packed up and went home. Marcus was tired but very happy.

questions.prompt: What day did Marcus go to the beach?

questions.hint: Read the second sentence of the first paragraph.
Find where it mentions his sister.

questions.prompt: What did Marcus and his sister build?
questions.hint: What can you build with sand at the beach?

questions.prompt: How many shells did they find?
questions.hint: Look for a number word in the passage.

questions.prompt: How did Marcus feel at the end of the day?

sections.name: Story 3: My Pet Dog
sections.instruction: Read the story carefully, then answer the questions.

passage.title: My Pet Dog
passage.content:
I have a pet dog named Brownie. He has soft brown fur and a long tail. Brownie is three years old.

Every morning, I give him food and fresh water. He likes to eat meat and biscuits. After he eats, he runs around the yard.

Brownie is a good dog. He barks when strangers come to our gate. At night, he sleeps in his little house in the yard.

questions.prompt: What colour is the dog's fur?
questions.hint: The dog's name gives you a clue!
Find the number in the first paragraph.

questions.prompt: What does Brownie like to eat?
Where does Brownie sleep at night?
options: In his little house in the yard
questions.correct: In his little house in the yard
